criteria.name: Tier 4.22r native context-state smoke pass exists or fresh bundle
criteria.rule: == pass OR missing in fresh EBRAINS bundle

criteria.name: reference native context retained three keyed slots
reference native route values cover both signs
runtime controller exposes schedule command
criteria.rule: Python host can schedule delayed-credit state on board

criteria.name: runtime controller exposes mature command
criteria.rule: Python host can mature delayed-credit state on board

criteria.name: runtime runtime schedule handler exists
criteria.rule: runtime computes prediction and schedules pending horizon

criteria.name: runtime runtime mature handler exists
criteria.rule: runtime matures pending horizon and updates readout

criteria.name: runtime fixed-point helper is s16.15
criteria.rule: config.h defines the same fixed-point scale as the Python reference

criteria.name: runtime readout prediction equation present
criteria.rule: runtime prediction must match local parity reference

criteria.name: runtime readout update equation present
criteria.rule: runtime maturation must match local parity reference
criteria.value: delta_w = lr * error * feature; delta_b = lr * error

criteria.name: runtime mature command supports explicit mature_timestep
criteria.rule: parity run uses explicit due_timestep to avoid timer-race false failures

criteria.name: runtime controller exposes returned due_timestep
criteria.rule: hardware parity can mature exactly the pending event it scheduled

criteria.name: runtime native context and route command constants exist
criteria.rule: custom runtime must expose native context plus native route state primitives

criteria.name: runtime native context write/read handlers use bounded C slots
criteria.rule: context state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only dictionary

criteria.name: runtime native route write/read handlers exist
criteria.rule: route state must be owned by the C runtime, not a host-only host scalar

criteria.name: runtime native routed schedule forms feature on chip
criteria.rule: host must send key+cue, while the runtime retrieves context+route and computes the scalar feature

criteria.name: runtime task loop can score pre-update predictions
criteria.rule: task micro-loop must evaluate the decision before credit updates the readout

criteria.name: runtime task loop increments decision counter
criteria.rule: minimal task loop must count decisions separately from rewards

criteria.name: runtime pending horizons do not store future target
criteria.rule: delayed-credit target must arrive at maturation, not be hidden in the pending record

reference.equation: chip feature=context_slot_lookup(key)*route_state*visible_cue; schedule prediction=w*feature+bias; keep pending across gap; mature oldest with target; w+=lr*(target-prediction)*feature; b+=lr*(target-prediction)

summary.claim_boundary: Tiny native route-state primitive layered on native keyed context only; not full native/on-chip v2 memory/routing, full CRA task learning, speedup evidence, scaling, or final autonomy.
summary.next_step_if_passed: Ingest returned Tier 4.22s files; if it passes, continue with the next native custom-runtime integration gate, likely bounded memory/routing composition.
